mapper.select:
SELECT app_id, app_nm, use_yn, memo, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by FROM tb_app_client
AND (app_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR app_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
AND use_yn = #{searchUseYn}
ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_app_client (app_id, app_nm, app_secret, use_yn, memo, created_by) VALUES (#{appId}, #{appNm}, #{appSecret}, #{useYn}, #{memo}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_app_client SET app_nm = #{appNm}, use_yn = #{useYn}, memo = #{memo}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE app_id = #{appId}
UPDATE tb_app_client SET app_secret = #{appSecret}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE app_id = #{appId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_app_client WHERE app_id = #{appId}
